---
name: Design critique
about: Challenge a design decision in the specification
title: "[design-critique] "
labels: design-critique
assignees: ''
---

## Which design decision

Link to the relevant spec section (e.g. `spec/03-confidence.md §3.2`).

## What's wrong with it

Describe the problem concretely. What does this decision fail to handle,
or handle badly?

## What you'd do instead

Your proposed alternative, and why.

## Tradeoffs

What does your proposal give up? No design is free; being honest about
the costs strengthens the critique.
